svg.title: An agentic banking assistant loop showing tool definitions sent in every request
svg.desc: Request 1 carries a system prompt, tool definitions and a question. The data center replies with a tool-call instruction, not a final answer. The app runs the tool locally. Request 2 carries the system prompt, the same tool definitions again, the history and the tool result; only then does the data center return the final answer. Tool definitions appear in every request.
svg.text: 1. Request 1 — the frame your app sends
2. The data center replies — NOT an answer, a tool-call instruction
3. Your app runs the tool locally
4. Request 2 — sent back with the tool result (tools resent AGAIN)
5. Now the data center returns the final answer
app runs it, then asks again
